subject: WS1.4 post-ready cleanup still green
body: Fiery WS1.4 update after product/tests-ready: I made two small cleanup fixes while awaiting support review: package.json dependency block ordering to match local pattern, and expanded-output validation now recurses through JSON-LD values like compact/frame validation. Re-ran focused verification after the cleanup: pnpm --filter @oaknational/graph-core test, type-check, lint, and build all passed.
